name: Taco Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, applesauce, sugar, salt, cornmeal, whole wheat flour, taco seasoning, bread flour, and yeast in the bread machine.
2. Select regular or medium dough cycle.
3. Let rise until doubled in size.
4. Shape into a loaf and place on a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty.
6. Turn off the oven.
7. Remove from the pan and let cool completely before slicing.
This recipe is adapted from Great Bread Machine Recipes by PNewton vkbb14a. It tastes like a taco and pairs well with chili.
